This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Piece of Rat Fur
Quest Item
This item can be used in tradeskills.
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

Item Lore:A Piece of Rat Fur
Item Type:Combinable
Stackable:1000
Merchant Value:0 pp 0 gp 0 sp 8 cp
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-17 05:26:56
Page Updated:Mon Aug 1st, 2022

Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Vendor Bait
Level to Attain: 1

an undead rat

a giant field rat
a large field rat

Send a correction
Post Comment
Drop Zones *HAVE* got to be wrong!
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2023 at 9:15 PM Rating: Decent
Drazzminius
Scholar
188 posts
I spent about 2 hrs in Innothule, another two in Gloomingdeep (killing nothing but rats and bats the whole time) and finally went to South Qeynos - got nothing at all in the first two zones and got 10 of them in S. Qeynos in probably 15 min.
____________________________
Mikaal Drazzminius
Tier'Dal Necromancer
Necrotalk Admin
EQ Traders Super Moderator
EQ Magelo Advisor/Moderator
Rodcet Nife by Birth / Quellious by Merger / Povar by Re-Merger
▲ Page top
Piece of Rat Fur
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2021 at 10:04 AM Rating: Good
Friar Bijou
View User Forum
GBATE!! Never saw it coming
9,998 posts
It used to be on +50% of the kills in Steamfont. I killed over 75 rats in the newbie are and over at the dragon skeleton. ZERO drops.
i went to the Qeynos newb area and had them in 5 minutes. As a bonus i got to kill Fippy yet again. It's been a good morning.
____________________________
remorajunbao wrote:
One day I'm going to fly to Canada and open the curtains in your office.

▲ Page top
looks gone
QuoteReply
# Apr 22 2021 at 3:01 PM Rating: Decent
mitsune
Scholar
102 posts
Same problem here. I have been looking at all the gives places but it does not seem to drop any more.
I think the fishing combines for lures are broken with this missing drop.
____________________________
Mitsune Foxfire, Vazaelle
▲ Page top
new information
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2020 at 6:03 AM Rating: Good
Shuraz
Sage
1,086 posts
I have some friends who wanted to work their fishing skill up and could not find this item. I went to my old haunts ( gloomdeep ) and could not get any. To me, it has been removed from many locations. I have seen for myself that it can still drop in Qeynos off rodents and was told in the Aqueducts as well but did not check.

I would love to have some for my students to use. I am currently teaching a HS forensics class and I really need the fur of different animals for the hair sutdy unit.
